title: Find refugee services in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Find services for refugees in Canada
Canada has several programs to help refugees resettle in Canada.
- Financial support for government-assisted refugees
- Find free newcomer services near you

## Services and information

### Health
                        care
Eligibility, how to apply, benefits, and information for health care professionals

### Get
                        help adjusting to Canada
Contact information for organizations that help with resettlement

### Financial
                        help
Eligibility, resettlement help and loans

### Government-assisted
                        refugees
Support for new refugees, Urgent Protection Program, and Women at Risk program

### Rights
                        as a refugee
Employment and education while your claim is being considered

### Protect
                        yourself from fraud
How to stay safe from immigration fraud, such as marriage or document fraud, and email and Internet
                    scams
- Immigration, Refugees and
                    Citizenship Canada

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
